feedback.text: Please help protect all the consumers around the world and set moral and consumer protecting laws around program/video game publishing businesses. If I pay for a program that was advertised as full one time purchase I should be able to access my program whenever I want and whereever I want. These companies set a bad precedence and corrupt the computer related businesses to adopt this kind of predatory publishing style where they can take back any program they wish to. We seriously need a regulation to protect people from this predatory business strategies hell bent on profit, reminiscent of victorian companies with 0 regulations toying around with their unlimited power just because they wrote "we can take it whenever we want" in their 600 page long EULA that is also skipable with a checkmark.
